name: game-theory-analyzer
description: A desktop game-theory analysis workspace for evidence-backed modeling, workflow-guided review, and AI-assisted strategic analysis.
author: Game Theory Analyzer contributors

scripts.test:smoke:prepare: BUILD_TARGET=electron bun --bun run build && bun run electron:compile && bun run mcp:compile
scripts.test:smoke: bun run test:smoke:prepare && bun run smoke-tests/desktop.ts && bun run smoke-tests/sse.ts && bun run smoke-tests/mcp.ts
scripts.test:smoke:desktop: bun run test:smoke:prepare && bun run smoke-tests/desktop.ts
scripts.test:smoke:sse: bun run test:smoke:prepare && bun run smoke-tests/sse.ts
scripts.test:smoke:mcp: bun run test:smoke:prepare && bun run smoke-tests/mcp.ts
scripts.test:live:codex: bun run mcp:compile && bun run smoke-tests/live-codex.ts
scripts.check:fast: bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit
scripts.check:pr: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun run electron:compile
scripts.check:release: bun run check:pr && bun run mcp:compile && bun run electron:build
scripts.electron:build: BUILD_TARGET=electron bun --bun run build && bun run electron:compile && bun run mcp:compile && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:mac-arm64: BUILD_TARGET=electron bun --bun run build && bun run electron:compile && bun run mcp:compile && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac --arm64 && if [ -f dist-electron/latest-mac.yml ]; then mv dist-electron/latest-mac.yml dist-electron/latest-mac-arm64.yml; fi
scripts.electron:build:mac-x64: BUILD_TARGET=electron bun --bun run build && bun run electron:compile && bun run mcp:compile && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac --x64
scripts.electron:build:mac-universal: BUILD_TARGET=electron bun --bun run build && bun run electron:compile && bun run mcp:compile && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac --arm64 --x64
scripts.electron:build:mac-both: bun run electron:build:mac-arm64 && bun run electron:build:mac-x64
